name: NEOXLINK SDK — UNSPSC Standardization & Agent Commerce
summary: UNSPSC-first Standardization for B2B: MCP tools and HTTP APIs that bridge chat to executable procurement records (Agent Commerce).

tools.name: neoxlink.parse_preview
tools.summary: NL → structured preview with UNSPSC Standardization; no auto-confirm (B2B / Agent Commerce).

tools.name: neoxlink.confirmed_submit
tools.summary: Parse + confirm (+ optional resolve) for durable Agent Commerce artifacts.

tools.name: neoxlink.match_intent
tools.summary: Optional local ranked match when NEOXLINK_ENABLE_MATCH=1 (offline Standardization demos).

resources.summary: Packaged UNSPSC subset bundled with the SDK for taxonomy lookup.
Single 8-digit UNSPSC record from the packaged subset.

NEOXLINK_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for https://neoxailink.com (set via host secret store; never commit).

NEOXLINK_BASE_URL.description: API base URL for self-hosted or staging stacks.

NEOXLINK_ENABLE_MATCH.description: Set to 1 to expose neoxlink.match_intent on the MCP server.

store_listing.tagline_zh: 把模糊需求变成可执行的 UNSPSC 标准商业语义，打通对话到交易。
store_listing.tagline_en: Turn fuzzy chat into UNSPSC-standardized B2B intent—Agent Commerce from talk to transaction.
store_listing.short_description_zh_max_100: 面向 B2B 与 Agent Commerce 的 UNSPSC Standardization 工具：解析非标需求、对齐全球商品服务代码，并可通过 MCP 供 Claude/Cursor 调用。
store_listing.pain_point_zh: 模型“听懂了”却落不了地：缺少标准编码与结构化确认，ERP/采购系统无法执行；本技能将对话桥接到可确认、可解析、可匹配的交易记录。
example_prompts: 用 UNSPSC Standardization 解析这条英文采购需求并给出结构化预览，不要自动确认：我们需要 500 个可回收瓦楞纸箱，两周内送达上海。
调用 neoxlink.confirmed_submit 提交一条 sell-side supply：我们提供企业级 Kubernetes 托管与 7x24 运维，标注为 supply。
读取 unspsc://catalog 资源，列出打包进 SDK 的 UNSPSC 代码，并说明哪个最贴近“软件定制开发”。

skillshub_publish.notes: skillshub.ai 的 REST 形态以厂商最新 OpenAPI 为准；deploy_to_skillshub.py 使用环境变量映射端点。
